name: Witness Fee and Record Reproduction Reimbursement

eligibility.description: Applies to persons summoned to appear or produce records, provided they do not have a proprietary interest in the records and are not the taxpayer under investigation (or their employee/attorney).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers and third parties summoned by the IRS can receive payment for mileage and fees, as well as reimbursement for costs incurred in searching for, reproducing, and transporting requested records.
